name: merch-agent-codex
description: Codex plugin for running Merch Agent as a policy-bounded autonomous AI research, decisioning, artwork, listing, validation, and package workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Policy-bounded autonomous Merch research and package creation.
interface.longDescription: Merch Agent Codex turns Codex into the agent control plane for end-to-end Amazon Merch opportunity research, trend analysis, competitor comparison, adaptive candidate scoring, niche and subniche decisions, creative direction, image generation, listing/keyword/price/marketplace decisions, local backend validation, and dashboard review. It treats local config as output contract and safety context, while allowing evidence-backed decisions outside weak defaults as long as Amazon policy and IP safety remain intact.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run Merch Agent as a policy-bounded autonomous merch strategist: search broadly, override weak defaults when evidence supports it, choose the best compliant opportunities, generate original artwork and listings, validate packages, and prepare only review-ready drafts.
